channel.title: Doom on Have an average day :|

item.title: Why was Doom ported to Linux? - YouTube
item.description: Ok, I know I haven’t been able to update daily, but I have a lot of content saved up. I’ll update when I have a minute. Untill then enjoy this post…. because it’s awesome. Why was Doom ported to Linux? – YouTube.
